decisions.rationale: The observation 'MTA New York City Transit' (entity_type: agency) matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct, which has the same entity_name 'MTA New York City Transit' and entity_type 'agency'. The observation's base_record_id is already entity_mta-nyct, and the registry record's aliases include entity_mta-nyct-presenter-2010-04-26, confirming this observation is already correctly resolved. Since the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id (not a different record), the decision is new.
